name: Candy Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert a popsicle stick part way through the stem end of each apple.
2. Prepare a baking sheet with cooking spray and set aside.
3. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine sugar, water, corn syrup, candies, and food coloring.
4. Boil without stirring until a candy thermometer reaches 290°F (about 20 minutes).
5. With a brush dipped in water, brush the sides of the pan to prevent burning.
6. Remove the mixture from the heat and briefly dip the pot bottom in cold water to stop cooking.
7. Carefully tip the saucepan, swirling each apple in the mixture to coat evenly.
8. Place the apples on the prepared baking sheet to cool quickly before the mixture hardens.
